content.text: Every labourer shall have the right to practice appropriate labour. Explanation: For the purposes of this Article, "labourer" means a labourer or worker who does physical or mental work for an employer in consideration for remuneration.
Every labourer shall have the right to appropriate remuneration, facilities and contributory social security.
Every labourer shall have the right to form and join trade unions and to engage in collective bargaining, in accordance with law.
